👋 About Us

Made by brothers, built for learners

English Learning Songs is a project by Julian and Jonah Levine — two brothers who combined their passions to make educational music for young learners around the world.

Our aim: make songs that are both educational and fun, drawing on a rich variety of musical styles. And make songs that are enjoyable for listeners of all ages, not just kids.
